text: located on the intersection at magazine and washington is this great starbucks location being on the intersection there are plenty of parking options available through out your visit there the line is always people long no matter what time i go but they usually manage to go through it pretty quickly which is nice on my last visit i wanted to try the gingerbread latte and i had a free birthday drink so when i placed my order i requested both of those the woman who took my order okayed it and along i went i paid with a different guy who ended up charging me for the drink which was supposed to free i explained that i told the other woman it was meant to be the free birthday special but he just laughed and said you have to tell me not her well she s the one that took my order so she should ve been the one to put me through the register too so that was annoying they just had no communication between the staff members and how he shrugged it off was irritating anyways i got my gingerbread latte and took a seat now this place is always busy so don t expect your ideal seating if you come too late in the day i ended up moving three times as new more preferred places to sit became available the downside to the seating is that there aren t many powerpoint available and starbucks has to know that people come to work here while they drink their coffee not a clever move the gingerbread latte was just okay it didn t taste like gingerbread at all so i was pretty disappointed but i managed to finish it off despite the lack of taste there is a wide variety of seating inside with wall seating tabled seating and a few couch seating which is nice there is also outdoor seating but during this weather it isn t recommended but would give you views of the street which is a nice distraction from the hustle and bustle from inside overall a beautiful location but the lack of communication and consideration the staff have between themselves and the customers made the visit spoiled
out of green tea in the middle of the day when it s and sunny you re better than that starbucks on the plus side after waiting minutes the barista who brought it out was super friendly

i came for the wi fi as pjs coffee has lacking wifi power just a few shops down the road there was ample seating and my regular coffee was promptly handed to me creamer bar was well stocked clean floor and loud music like all the other homogonize starbucks you have ever been too

busy and central location makes this a coffee stop and social event this location is open longer than the close by peets or the other starbucks in the la cumbre mall across the street the staff always keeps a good pace and sets a high standard for the slower starbucks

not up to the high standards of service that most starbucks are know for i ordered a triple grande caramel mach and when i got it it felt like only two thirds full i was in a hurry so i didn t complain as i should have as i was leaving i stopped to go to the restroom and a pregnant young woman coming out warned me there was no toilet paper i went into the other restroom and it was also out of paper and dirty very disconcerting

for the most part this location does a decent job in delivering good temperature appropriate food beverages on many occasions they ve forgotten to give napkins condiments and or handed items out of the window one by one rather than putting everything into a bag i know there s a pandemic going on and shortages on supply but let s think logically and give the customers what they need

as others has said this is by far one of the slowest locations i ve ever been at one person working taking orders and working as a cashier the majority of my time in the drive thru was listening to her taking orders a definite need for more help or training my frappe was very good but melted a little while i waited to be served

we stopped in for a iced tea on a very warm day customer service was good my tea was good as well the store felt very warm inside and we ended up going out and sitting in the car with air on to cool off

thank you doth such a place share such an idea with a complement reader seeks a very refined polite female acquaintance who may further an incomplete introduction to society though discreetly background

it s a starbucks you know what their coffee tastes like meh and what their prices are like high so i ll tell you why this became my starbucks they recently renovated the seating and it s a great study spot reliable wifi big tables in the middle a comfy couch in the corner and seating all alongside the window read convenient outlets and people watching huge improvement to the awkward tiny circular tables they had before it can get randomly crowded sometimes why any family would decide to bring all their children here for an afternoon or why a mom would bring teens to drink frappucinos is beyond me the barristas are nice one of them made fun of me for having been there every day for a week when writing the paper that wouldn t die i appreciated that he noticed i still prefer independent coffee shops like citadelle or toast but when i m too lazy to go that far this will do plus i m a sucker for that passion iced tea in the summer get it half sweetened it s better and for it s pretty good

your typical starbucks a good stop on a nice day while shopping in beautiful suburban square there is plenty of outdoor seating available to enjoy the sun while you self medicate your caffeine addiction
free wifi free power for devices over priced drinks exactly what you would expect

used to be one of my favorites but a fair number of the staff aren t as friendly as the previous employees i like their product but half of the starbucks attraction is atmosphere and if employees are grumpy it ruins the vibe

i have ordered a couple of times here and sometimes their coffee is good but on occasion you get a cup of milk with watered down coffee on one occasion i asked for a caramel macchiato and it tasted like milk with caramel no coffee whatsoever and i was disappointed because i love starbucks but overall it s a good way to grab a quick coffee if your on the go or if you re late and the next time i might ask for an extra shot in my macchiato happy eating

i love starbucks and this is two miles from my home but the parking has become impossible last two times i ve been no parking drove across the street to an independent equally good coffee shop i want to be a loyal customer but this location is making it hard don t do business coffee here anymore either no quiet tables for two the staff here is great the space is clean but it needs a bigger space and parking lot

disappointed when i got my vanilla bean frap i asked for extra carmel and i didn t get one drop of carmel the person in drive thru really needs to listen to the customers order and they didn t have enough green tea

i opened this review like oh this will be an easy up as i thought of my quick trip but actually the layout of this location is can i cuss it s enough to not go back actually i ve been inside this location at least x and the service cleanliness speed and atmosphere were fine during peak hours you can t even get into the parking lot because it s a narrow angled one way drive around there s not enough room inside of their parking lot to accommodate the waiting cars so they sit in the street causing a traffic jam there s other traffic from the other businesses in the suite it s the most frustrating thing you can t even get inside of the lot to park to order inside or grab your pickup items i had actually mobile ordered and was almost involved in an accident trying to get inside my order was sitting at the station waiting for me

not my favorite venue but was in a hurry and needed a caffeine fix starbucks starbucks i never see any differences except location service even the staff seems the same expensive but good coffee what s a girl to do caffeine fixes can reach critical levels

standard issue starbucks coffee tasted about the same as most of the other starbucks i ve been to the seating area inside and outside is relatively large no drive thru prices were about the same and the friendliness factor at starbucks is generally bordering weird as it is
decent latte great quick drive thru what else can you say
not a lot of seating but they get my orders out in a timely manner service is good and it is clean
great drinks like any starbucks and great customer service but the bugs flying around are so annoying i can t study do work in the store i have to sit outside because the gnats flies are so present
got a vanilla iced latte with oat milk a chai tea late and a caramel br l e latte they gave me an extremely small cup for the latte and it was still about the cups were also sticky

people working at pm on a thursday one of whom is training we went inside to order our two drinks a honey almondmilk flat white and a mocha frappuccino it took at least minutes to get our drinks now they do have a drive through they had some pre orders and of those people were training but the trainee made our drinks and there were only drinks picked up while we were there it s obvious their priority is with the drive through customers and this is something all of the starbucks seem to do at least in my recent experience their specialty drinks are tasty but overall starbucks brewed coffee is horribly over roasted read burned still when i can t locate a local coffeehouse and there is a starbucks nearby when i need a coffee fix i ll go

a convenient star for this part of the world with access from both street road and second street pike its proximity to some of my favorite restaurants aroi thai blue sage and house of pho make it a perfect quick apr s dinner stop for hot brew on the way to the movies or home it is not the most attractive franchise unit in the area but it serves a functional purpose unlike a box of chocolates you always know what you are going to get

was super excited to have this location here since i could hit the drive by before work to grab coffee i did go inside and it s very small the entrance is shared with the bank however the first time going the service was super slow and there were only customers in line the one barista messed up my friends drink it was remade and she loved it so she didn t complain but my friend had to remind the women to give her a cookie she ordered my nd time going was very pleasant and i used the drive thru very convenient and look forward to coming back
it s as good as any starbucks mediocre at best

first of all i love starbucks my husband and i were looking for coffee the day we left reno we figured any starbucks is the same i was disappointed with this location and had to wait over minutes for two coffees the way it was set up it was awkward to say the least it seemed we had to push chairs out of the way to walk out the one and only door we had to enter the workers were friendly enough but it just seem to take forever and was awkward

i love starbucks but i avoid this one it has some of the slowest service i have ever experienced at a starbucks i was there days ago the guy who was doing the drinks loves to talk to the costumers and his co workers which is fine i just noticed he does a lot of talking and no working too he will stop working and just start talking and talking there was only one person ahead of me and it still took almost minutes to get my drink i also got over charged at one point the price on the menu was lower then the price i was charged i added nothing special to my drink i was going to ask for an explanation or my money back but there was a big line at that point so i let it go small coffee shop not much sitting music can be too loud sometimes on the plus side there is a sweet cece s and a chipotle right next door that s a bonus

it s my local starbucks the staff is always very friendly and has more to say than what do you want has a drive through if it wasnt out of my way i d visit more often man i wish there was another one closer to my house can we get a starbucks at the beach
extremely long wait but grateful for the drive thru staff are pleasant got my drinks right

good overall coffee service notes the main entrance is the same for both the bank right starbucks left my flat white was good but not great and my one wish would be that they add a clover brewing system

i rate this starbucks stars instead of because as another reviewer stated this starbucks tends to be consistently busy and loud on the inside i would not recommend having a meeting interview or phone call here the drive thru is very busy as well and is one of the slower drive thrus i have used at a starbucks the staff is below average and there seems to be a fair amount of attrition i have received more wrong orders here than at other starbucks it is clean on the inside and has nice outdoor seating the large windows to the south make the afternoon sunshine coming in nice

i m used to quality service came back from europe where baristas are awesome i drive about minutes to get to this starbucks and their service is getting worse every time i come here two days in a row i asked for a brownie and chocolate chip cookie at pm and they are out of it those are two main things a coffee shop should have coffee was good tho so i will be taking my business else where can t go to red lion and blvd or the one inside target which is the worst of them all probably try abington area next time

this is one of my go to starbucks places but it s just an ok location they re always constantly busy the drive thru wraps around the building almost every time i m there stars because they can actually make the drinks so if you can wait for good drinks deff come here if not just go to the mall or down the street to target

incredibly busy constantly i came here a few times during a trip to tulane and visited during the week and on a weekend and it seemed like there was always a line out the door i think because of this the service wasn t the friendliest but i can understand given the sheer volume of orders the outside patio is really nice and would be a great place to work or study i just wish there would have been space the few times i was there

dan is the man at this drive thru actually most of the staff that service the window are friendly personable attentive accurate and prompt but dan adds entertainment to the list good coffee and other drinks not liking the new items offered through la boulange or however you spell it most of the pastries need to be heated to taste good as they are refrigerated or stale tasting otherwise on the plus side they seem to have more offerings than in the past as far as pastry variety quality of food is no where near panera but tops on beverages you will encounter long lines at windows on rush hour parking lot is tough and not driver friendly use caution

starbucks on the washu danforth campus bauer hall the business school this means a few things changing hours based on the school calendar when school is not in session it may be closed or open for a short amount of time unpredictable hours if the school has a special event it may be closed lack of seating space during peak hours like lunch time though there are a lot of tables it shares the space with the b school cafe which has a lot of undergraduate and graduate students there all the time you can use the app to pay but can t redeem rewards or order ahead of time for pickup wonderful staff
this starbucks is cramped every time i have been in there the coffee doesn t taste as fresh as other starbucks the staff is friendly but it s certainly not a first choice for me
frequently get lukewarm coffee they always remake the coffee when i have time to go in and ask but this is starbucks they should have hot coffee at all times

quick service very clean i ordered a blonde cappuccino and after the foam i had less then half a drink that s was really disappointing flavor was good just wish i could have had a full cup for the price of starbucks drinks

i guess it was ok i am just use to the staff at my usual sb s remembering me spoiled yes the staff was nice and the coffee exceptional i paid with my iphone app that s always fun i will go back to my usual starbucks from now on
solid stars it was pretty clean to be so populated and they served regular starbucks and did not try to rip me off unlike the starbucks on south broad street

i love starbucks coffee and not all the stores are the same this location is nice because it does have a drive thru window if you just want to get it on the run inside is pretty clean and kept up not very big but there are outdoor tables if you want to sit outside i always ask for my drink extra hot and for some reason this location never has been able to do that for me the parking lot is not very big and is usually crowded since they do share it with other businesses i usually park in the raleys lot and walk over

this is open for a while now and one thing they need to work on is maintaining the condiments counter i m there often and almost always its out of supplies i m also somewhat disappointed that they don t fill the coffee to the top why should i get cup of coffee happened too many times to not say anything about

this is the fivebucks in the lobby of the big marriott in center city and it gets busy and crowded and messy at the sugar creamer station and attracts a few vagrants who are quickly ushered away from tourist eyes meanwhile i needed a latte and i latte i obtained what a rush try not to come here from am on a weekday mob scene

i have to update my review based on the experience i had on a double star thursday obviously it was a busy morning which is why i placed my order with the mobile app i arrived minutes after the eta i was provided there were at least baristas running around i stood right in front of the mobile order plastic window protector for about minutes without being acknowledged by anyone then another lady came around me and one barista finally came over to ask her first if she s been helped i highly doubt you didn t see my broad shoulders in my large black hoodie sis i just don t know what it is sometimes this location provides outstanding service and then other times you get barely mediocre service at least my eggnogg latte and roasted ham and swiss sandwhich tasted good i asked for shots of espresso in my eggnogg latte but it didn t taste extra charged like i was hoping

this is an average starbucks near the entrance to terminal a and the baggage claim area i have been a couple times while waiting on delayed luggage my order has always been correct so no complaints there there are a few nice chairs to lounge in while burning time

more than half of the people here were waiting for their coffee i put in a mobile order and my breakfast sandwhiches were done by the time i arrived however my brewed coffee and green tea took a total of minutes exactly they re down to one espresso machine today but it seemed like there were plenty of staff one person was being trained maybe have someone pour drip coffee and make tea otherwise place seems nice plenty of seating and not too loud

this location usually has an extremely long line but thanks to being early wait time was relatively short all the folks behind the counter were friendly and energetic but they don t have any breakfast sandwiches

i happen to spend a lot of time and money at this starbucks every time i go i am amazed at how slow the drive thru line moves the lady baristas are ok but jay and guy put them to shame with their impressive customer service skills drinks are inconsistent but beggars can t be choosers

i come here all the time most of the time the staff is on point a few times ive had one particular young lady at the drive thru who just doesn t understand coffee money or customer service tonight in particular i ordered a dirty chai with an extra shot and she told me i was ordering a made up drink ummmm no that s a very common drink served at most coffee shops it s literally on their menu when she went to hand me the drink she just shoved her arm in my car and didn t say a word just hoped i saw her it s very weird and she needs training everyone else is great just not her
this was a typical starbucks service was prompt staff was pleasant

knowledgeable barristas who don t hesitate to give you good service its what you really are paying for at starbucks not the coffee they are always busy but being so close to the movies and off the highway has that effect

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks and this one is a starbucks that doesn t say much but simultaneously says it all i m a purist with my coffee and always just order coffee no frills there should be a separate line for people like me who order they turn and fill a cup and we are gone i don t even need to go to the separate counter to pick up but i digress this was coffee and it was good
close to the freeway good for travelers good promt service nice drinks like any starbucks mostly close to the freeway
this place has the a c on freezer cold bring a sweater everything else seems normal
this place is easy to get to in center city the staffs are friendly and drinks are well made i was able to get in and out quickly not bad
my once a month place while waiting for my wife s meeting to end always busy a bit noisy but if i xan sit in the comfy chair im happy friendly baristas

this review regards this location not the amazing food and drinks this starbucks is a local hangout for high schools like baldwin and shipley i think that everyone agrees that their parking lot is atrocious it is impossible to find parking especially in the morning it is always hard to sit down and some on the seating in the left side of the starbucks is really weird there are two big tables that are simply awkward some of the baristas there is super friendly but it isn t rare that i get a non attentive barista

the best thing about this starbucks is seeing the line of cars wrapped around the building as you walk inside to no line the worst part waiting because everyone working is handling all the requests from the drive thru other than that it s an average starbucks with the usual offerings
always good service need plant based food options all locations i have noticed much better snacks

i just love having a bit of heaven in a cup on my way to work in the morning such a treat this location is brightly lit clean and roomy everyone we ve met there has been friendly and helpful the store is gearing up for christmas and have added some pretty nice shiny bits free wi fi nice location and great company while enjoying my hot beverage what more can i ask
this starbucks was ok small cramped and people lounge everywhere so there was no where to sit the staff seemed gossipy and distracted not my favorite one i will stop here on an as needed basis

parking is a challenge because it s so busy outlets to work off of are not easily accessible like at other locations i don t think i ll be back here anytime soon i don t like the layout here havertown is so much better in that regard
i have gotten my usual vente americano here they did a fine job makes me want to grab some every time before i shop

i have to comment on the drive thru service folks i continue to have the unfortunate pleasure of being served by ladies who seem to dislike working at starbucks never been to a starbucks where customer service was just disappointing and boring i might as well been served at a dmv many of us enjoy the idea of ordering from starbucks and having us a fancy drink being served by a friendly upbeat employee i continue to be robbed of such experience please switch out the drive thru ladies
very large plenty of study space friendly attentive staff very very very cold staff said they have no control over the heat everyone had their winter coats on i had to leave it was so cold

not the easiest starbucks to get to because of but other than that it s pretty much your typical starbucks inside during our visit i think the cashier was in training as he seemed to be struggling with the orders but other than that no major issues my order came out quickly and correctly there is no drive thru at this location

this location usually very busy seating is decent the problem is for some reason the customers here all think they live in beverly hills and shouldn t have to wait or suffer the fools behind the counters the employees here have always treated me well

this is a review for the charbucks next to the wyndham garden inn on route in exton this starbucks is walk able from there and literally saved me throughout the weekend of a conference where i was forced to stay at the wymdham i came here for breakfast got some decent coffee and a breakfast sandwich which beat the heck out of the pre packaged grab go garbage that the hotel was offering i alsostopped in around pm during a break in the conference and got a much needed macchiatto sp thank you fourbucks

right on main street in new hope nice outside seating although your view is of the intersection quick service with a smile and the typical starbucks quality no parking at the store since it on main street so don t think you are going to just pull into the parking lot and run in
great customer service on every visit the employees ate always so chipper they make my visit thru the drive thru great

i love this place i spend a lot of time here yes i drink a lot of coffee and tea to add a needs improvement comment i think this location would serve its customers better if they spent more time on cleanliness they really need an employee to address the trash cans which aren t emptied until they re overflowing they really need an employee to walk the floor with a dust mop picking up paper scraps dropped napkins and the like they really need an employee to wipe down each table they really need an employee to address the restrooms refilling tissue seat covers soap and sweeping the floor the manager is very nonchalant and appears to not notice these problems in a place with such a revolving door of customers all day every day cleanliness should be priority one add the recent virus outbreaks in the news and i d say sanitizers should be everywhere if i were managing the above items would be addressed times a day between rushes i still love them though

i always go to this starbucks before work and love the drive through option and the sleek look however getting in and out of there is insane gulf to bay is one of the busiest highways without having a light it makes it far more difficult i hope the move works out for them but i will not be going to this one before work anymore

smaller starbucks in the olde city section of philly can get cramped when busy seating is at a premium typical food and drinks here service is the usual efficient folks kids that work at these places never any issues parking of course is tough in this area does the job for starbucks fans that live and work in the area and want a drink or bite to go but if you are looking for place to bring your laptop and sip your latte slowly there are better starbucks to be found
typical starbucks nice location and nice enough staff drinks are overpriced so i don t come here often but i love the passion fruit lemonade

recently renovated the pros more modern looking there s more fridge space to offer more non coffee items the baristas are still the same ones pre renovation there s outdoor seating now the cons power outlets eliminated all except for the new furniture seems to be intentionally less comfortable to keep people from hanging out for a long amount of time they still make the beverages in a quality way but sadly it is no longer the coffee shop that s designed to be a place for casual conversation

this is a pretty good sbux long but swiftly moving line accurate order fulfillment ample condiment station plenty of comfy shmumfy leather armchairs footrests and power outlets what more could you ask for maybe a lil of that free sbux wi fi but no its in the usf library and guess what you need a visitor code oh well everything else is great

this location is poorly operated and the service is always slow yes i understand it takes longer to make some of the specialty drinks but the service here is very slow this morning there was a long line and a woman complaining that her mobile drink was not ready for pick up again forget the sensitivity training and train your employees how to actually provide service at a reasonable pace the star rating is for the decent size parking lot and decent size indoor outdoor seating other than that not much else i can say

oh you know your run of the mill starbucks the bathrooms were clean this starbucks seems much larger than other locations there is plenty of seating as well as outdoor seating the staff was friendly but the drinks do take quite a while not sure if i will be back to this starbucks it s in the most convenient location to get in and out
slow service ordered one iced coffee with cream and one americano plain took over twenty minutes to make and no apology for the wait i don t care for starbucks coffee but was desperate

i usually drive through starbucks but today i had to use the facilities so i went inside i ordered my usual iced blueberry black tea no liquid cane sugar two pumps sugar free vanilla it was not very busy i used the restroom came back out and waited and waited and waited for my ice tea while waiting another lady asked where her egg bites were she already had drank of her venti tea and still no food it appeared that the young men working were too busy talking to a young girl to fill orders one girl was working and she was doing everything i m not sure they left out the cane syrup as i watched her make my drink by that point i just wanted my drink and to leave not a happy customer today i m hoping sbux sends me a request for a survey as they often do
i really wish this starbucks was bigger it s such a nice place to study but it gets so crowded however it does have good working wifi

let me start by saying i am a starbucks fan i do enjoy the friendly customer service i receive at this location and this is why i continue to return time and time again however id like to understand why it is you have signature drinks such as white chocolate mocha for example and i am certain each staff member is trained on how to make such drinks with the proper measurements of ingredients being added thus making it a signature drink that if you order it it should at least have that familiar taste to it each and every time for the life of me i cant seem to figure out why that isn t the case at least not in my experience to this location i generally get the same drinks each time however depending on the person working it can taste as unfamiliar to me as the person serving the drink all id like to know is why if everyone is making the same drinks nothing extra is being added or removed how come i cant seem to get the same drink each time with the same expectant taste i came here for

bumbling and questioning the customer was my experience with this location i m a regular customer but i usually avoid this store today my order and payment process were messed up and the fix of both were cumbersome i had already left the store when i realized my food order was wrong i came back and was questioned if i had really ordered what i wanted i think the person taking my was very distracted and i believe that was the reason for the issues but she didn t really accept full responsibility

i really like the interior but i don t like how online it says open till but then i get there to work on a paper and they tell me at pm they close in minutes they didn t have their hours posted anywhere in the store i also don t like how they start putting their food away at pm

ok as far as starbucks go would love a little more friendly vibe but haven t seen that from here ever not saying it s unfriendly just blah varied crowd if you want to people watch i mean it is downtown clearwater after all

love starbucks but this location is always busy am and i m th in the carline to order sometimes they bring out a barista to take orders and speed up the process but that is inconsistent in my experience the service is always friendly but the cashiers inside and at the drive through do not seem to have the urgency you d expect for somewhere that gets this much traffic

starbucks is always good i love the oatmeal and passion tango ice tea my boyfriend had a coffee frap he liked very much the only reason i m giving stars to this starbucks is because i looked all over for a recycling bin to recycle my cups etc and it was no where to be found there was a whole story on the wall about how starbucks is trying to be green etc but there was no recycling bin they definitely need a recycling bin and a compost bin then they will get five stars

no drive thru small location mediocre staff they seem less friendly than other stores not because they are snobby they re just clueless i guess starbucks is becoming the job of this decade as compared to mcdonalds of the s lol it s not exactly a happy store not the starbucks culture

i enjoy starbucks and this location it s right in the middle of town and you can sit outside and enjoy your coffee and the weather my only complaint is the long wait and it s a bit dirty the tables and chairs always have some kind of spill marks and crumbs and the bathrooms are just filthy i m sure if they fixed those things up it would be much more appealing getting my grande white chocolate mocha now

doesn t open until most days fyi i ve gotten good drinks here and bad drinks here i ve also gotten food warmed up fully and food that s still frozen in the middle seems like a hit or miss location regarding quality

it s a starbux so its the usual good quality coffee consistent i m here in the evening it s not crowded but steadily busy no waiting had a cranberry bliss bar that didn t seem to be quite as good i remembered not sure if it s my memory or it just wasn t as good but hey i like starbux this one is as good as others but no special hi how are ya s

in the land of dunkin donuts it was nice to actually find a starbucks unfortunately the whole our air condition barely works bs is not helping the fact a large pile of sweat beads is starting to drip down the crack of my ass as i sat their on my lap top trying to pretend my life is meaningful

we stopped in this starbucks to kill some time waiting for dinner reservations while the barista who took our order she was brand new was helpful and super sweet what i found horribly off putting was there was an off duty staff member in line in front of us who was incredibly rude to the new barista behind the till to the point she just let herself behind the counter to punch in the order herself also at the kid station the garbage had been pulled out like someone was changing it but never finished for nearly minutes aside from that our drinks and food were prompt and very tasty after the horrible attitude of the off duty barista though i don t know that i ll be in a huge rush to return to this location
i love my coffee but they were really sloooooooow i miss the old staff they had

this starbucks is in a cute little part of webster groves next to gazebo park where events and farmers markets are held in summer it s just like any other starbucks but this is right next to my work so i go there all the time usually around pm when i hit the afternoon slump the staff are friendly and always prompt with my order and they rarely mess it up my go to drinks are the white chocolate mocha with non fat milk and no whipped cream as well as the java chip frappacino skinny and without whipped cream the clientele at this location are a mixture of business people hippies young teens nerinx hall an all girls high school is just around the corner university students webster university is within walking distance artists entrepreneurs and stay at home moms you really get a mixed bag here i typically don t sit and stay to drink my lattes but when i have in the past the furniture is comfy with a variety of seating choices for individuals or small groups and the place is kept clean and orderly it doesn t wow my pants off but it maintains the high standard of starbucks that i expect a solid standby

this is a pretty crappy starbucks as far as starbuck shops go the outside is a orange red color that is atrocious to look at i was trying to find the place after driving off the i expected a shop with the starbuck colors of green and pale yellow the location of the store is crowded with little stores and has lots of traffic it is not a restful place there s the subliminal fear that at any moment an early model sedan will come crashing through the windows into the area where people drink coffee well that s how i felt whoever decorated the store didn t go out of their way to overcome that ugly look of asphalt and parked cars maybe it doesn t matter they have a good business and the coffee is good but if you read those starbuck books by schultz you d get the idea that just because all the other stores are scary drab and dreary doesn t mean starbucks has to be oh well grabbed the coffee and the calorie fruit bar and took off

good experience maybe it s me i just don t get the hype of starbucks at all i had a gift card for starbucks i thought it had and change turns out it was eight two cents my husband ordered the white mocha drink and enjoyed it i got the sweet cream cold brew very good my daughter has educated me on many things starbucks lol so relieved to see gender neutral bathrooms insert sarcasm here apparently this is a big deal in the yelp check in world the starbucks is comfy and relaxing and we sat in the cozy leather chairs i don t know i always feel so out of place in these kinds of coffee places i m usually super basic black coffee no cream no sugar can i be any more boring i think back to an episode of curb your enthusiasm when larry david went to a place like this and has no idea about the menu his order was just give me a vanilla bullshit drink that s what i ve always got in my mind when i go to these kind of snobby coffee bars lol
hello it s starbucks what else do you need to know this one does have more space than the average and a nice outdoor seating patio otherwise order your normal caramel nowhip crapuccino and enjoy

morning crew on saturday needs to up their game baristas didn t get tops solidly on the cups this didn t start the morning off well they had difficulty comprehending simple directions in spite of having to clean up spilled coffee i gave the place three stars because during the week this place usually gives good service

my current star review of this starbucks location is based on a recent visit at the location and could change based on future visits i really enjoy getting their pike place coffee and the spicy chorizo sandwich or the bacon and gouda sandwich for breakfast but one morning i wanted to switch it up and ordered the steak breakfast wrap and put my order in through the mobile app when my wife and i arrived to pickup our order she had gone inside to get our food and drinks when she got inside there was a note on a bag that said see the cashier my wife was confused and asked the worker at the counter what the note meant and they told my wife to go wait in the cashier line for help after waiting in line the cashier informed her that they were out of the wrap and that they could make something else instead my wife proceed to request a bacon and gouda sandwich and waited five minutes without anyone working on the sandwich she went up to the worker who was making the food and asked when the sandwich would be done the worker then threw down the tongs and said they would get to it right away in a somewhat attitude like voice after waiting a total of minutes for a sandwich when we had put the mobile order in minutes earlier this was a pretty big let down if we decide to come back to this location i will update my review as it reflects on the most recent service which i hope will be better than the last time

i was originally going to keep this short sweet you know an espresso with lumps of sugar and stars then i got to thinking about starbucks they were the originators of the chain specialty coffee shops they have grown by leaps and bounds and managed to make money they are a fortune company that has stayed independent with out being franchised new opportunities are available for having a starbucks inside a business hotel or hospital i think starbucks is grossly overpriced why do i say that if i order an espresso in a fine dining restaurant i pay that and more i am unusual in the fact that i love coffee good strong colombian coffee period i make that at home so i do not see the sense in buying it out i also have an espresso machine i am not into lattes or cappuccino s they have a new line of hot chocolates that are sure to be a hit i have had the opportunity to try many of their sandwiches which come into the starbucks already made the ones i have had are very good i also love their breads the multi grain berry bread with egg salad is exceptional their muffins are wonderful but they re still overpriced

this location is quite hit and miss i don t recommend the drive thru here plus it s an inconvenient parking lot if you re trying to grab a quick cup of joe that being said if you re meeting a friend for a leisurely coffee date this location might be the right one for you slower paced and not very busy

i like to refer to this location as a manhattan style starbucks because it s size and general atmosphere remind me of multiple locations found on the upper west side today there wasn t much seating available as this location is on a university campus and there were a number of students and faculty lingering with their drinks while focusing diligently on various papers books and laptop screens even so i was able to walk right up to the register and order a hot chocolate surprisingly in a good way my drink was not blisteringly hot rather it was at a temperature that allowed me to enjoy a hot drink on a cold day as soon as i had it in my hand

the location and atmosphere are fine it s a mall location i just feel bad for the girl rosie she is miserable at her job and tries to make the feeling mutual u pick ur job love u don t have to hate life n people don t want that vibe notrosie

i live around the corner so i go to this location frequently i don t judge them on their packed drive through or parking lot it s the way most things are in seminole heights my problem with this location is that every time that i visit it after around am they are out of everything milk food cold brew flavor syrups literally everything it s really frustrating to wait in that long drive through line only to find out that they are out of milk

this is just like any other starbucks you ve ever been to minus comfortable seating the place is always busy and the staff is pretty efficient but very business oriented even rethink is focused on speed and less on hospitality the coffee is starbucks so nothing fancy it s the same fare you can get at any location anywhere the work areas are clean but the merchandise is covered in a layer of dust just goes to show that i m not the only one who thinks a oz tumbler should cost less than but it s a moot point because i wanted a better cup of coffee but i had to very much settle for starbucks

i stopped in at what was the original delaware county starbucks it has been updated a few times since it first opened they stuck with only tables on the last two renovations i hadn t been here in a while but stopped in while waiting for a friend to finish their appointment a few doors down it was a friday evening and i was a bit disappointed there were several people working the counter and i got good service and good coffee why then was i unhappy you are thinking as i am waiting cruising the internet i am in the company of or so pubescent tweeners who are talking drugs and private parts to the extent that in any other location this would be sexual harassment thank goodness it only lasted minutes but i was surprised that the staff just ignored it and let it go on after they left i was inundated by two more sets of teenagers not a place for adult drinkers like the havertown location

first impression was that it is has a unique layout and it a pretty good size for a downtown location there was plenty of seating and we were able to get a table right away impacts on the experience were the spotty wifi poor acoustics the ambient noise was more overbearing than in most locations conversation really travels here and lastly though it is a matter of opinion it was pretty cold as well

starbucks comes with all the standard setbacks chain restaurant average coffee and questionable service this location adds difficult parking and supersaturated drive thru as additional headaches with that said it is close to home and the staff is comprised of interesting folks that are friendly and conversational you may not find this to be true on your first visit but the place grows on you
starbucks products are great this store doesn t have the friendly service like most i will come here again if i need coffee and am in the area but it s nothing special

as a general rule i try not to write reviews for chains but i make exceptions on occasion this store seems to be investing in the community and is trying to find a balance of being a drive thru and a destination it s definitely an anchor for irvington overall it s a pretty comfortable place to chill and enjoy free wi fi the demands of being a drive thru store makes it so the baristas are not as friendly as i ve seen in other stores i wish lazy daze or another indy coffee store would get it s together to be a real competitor to sbux in the area but from what i ve seen that s not the case at this time coffee standard starbucks food yes vibe standard starbucks wifi yes free plugs yes

another starbucks typical drinks typical snacks typical decoration so what makes this one different from the rest i can point out pros and con pro location this is located on a busy corner of one of the busiest foot traffic streets in edmonton whyte ave also known as nd ave so the location makes this starbucks a great place to meet up with friends while enjoying an afternoon out and about another great aspect about the location is the ability to people watch whether you sit inside or at a table on the sidewalk this is a great location to soak in your surroundings pro i like the bar space set up inside this is something i haven t seen at any other starbucks just to the left of the barista brewing centre there is a bar with about stools set up it is fun to watch the barista s work behind the counter and i love the space available the round tables at typical starbucks are quite small if you are going there to do work but this particular bar is very wide which is ideal to spread out books and papers con i guess this is related to the first pro the fact that it is located on a busy street means lots of street noise from vehicles driving by and also can make it difficult to find parking hopefully this encourages people to take public transit but i know that option is not always feasible overall i do really like this starbucks especially in the summer while the city is abuzz with all of the festivals taking place
this is a pretty decent place to come to and do homework free wi fi can t complain

cute little location near terrytown gretna looks like a log cabin somewhat i stopped here a few times during a recent business trip to pick up my fix note the small parking lot tight drive thru you can only turn right leaving

this starbucks is located in a big gateway shopping center and is my go to after i hit up saladworks or the deli or the taco joint at lunch time in the morning it s swamped but at lunch i can usually get my four bucks try almost for a grande iced macchiato caffeine fix le sigh

shtarbucks guys i was waiting for my order for some time and had to hurry up with eating because of the flight boarding on my nose i dropped some food on my pants because of that i understand some inconveniences might happen in any kind of job but there were not that many people and still i had to wait more than it usually takes please take it into the consideration

terrible cold brew i ordered a trente because i needed the boost to get stuff done this morning i watched them fill the cup of the way and they handed it back to me severely watered down with melted ice less than seconds later which leads me to believe they filled the rest with water super upsetting considering i spent on a coffee
i usually don t like starbucks but this one has fat friendly service and a big outdoor patio with comfortable furniture

standard starbucks but in a great building the flying saucer building stars is a stretch considering after months of nearly daily visits at the same time they still can not remember my name or drink guess i am asking too much

enjoying a sbux iced reserve blend dragon i believe super dark plenty robust apparently this new line is only available at certain locations i work in wayne pa and they informed me there was none in that area that carried the reserve line tastes like real coffee

relative to other starbucks this one is generally okay nothing horrible nothing great the building doesn t look like a typical starbucks and the first time i went here i actually drove by it it s easy to find parking and the place is on the small side about maybe tables plus a few chairs inside and then an outside patio for when it s nicer out i ve always been able to find a table inside though the service is decent the line fluctuates between quite long and empty and the noise level fluctuates between quiet and very loud service is okay speed of drinks is okay food is okay the bathrooms were clean and they have free wifi generally a decent middle of the road starbucks but it s main advantage is its location right on near the kop mall
saturday morning is crazy everything was good but minutes to get your drink sheesh should have had instead of on cash register and instead of making the drinks

this starbucks location is located in next to the national constitution center which is a plus no free easy parking in the area so this spot is great for walking traffic the staff was nice they did not have cookies available so my son was disappointed i ll definitely be back

the line can be really long in the drive through going inside seems to be punishment for not waiting in the drive through i tried that once and they filled drive through orders for every body inside it seemed drinks are always yummy though

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks there s a reason these places are so popular and it s not because they each exhibit a sense of individuality walk into a starbucks on the south side like this one and your experience will most likely be the same as walking into one on the west end or north side i rather like the feeling when i m going for coffee i want to be able to relax in a comfortable familiar setting i m also currently addicted to these places since they brought back the holiday special beverages yum unfortunately this one isn t all that great for people watching as it s right in the middle of a shopping mall parking lot ah well can t win them all
slowest starbucks ever three years i ve been coming here and they never disappoint guaranteed time to get a latte minutes i will say the people who work there are nice but come on
slowest starbucks i ve ever been to don t use the drive through you ll be stuck for an hour
me hi can i have a rice crispy treat barista do you mean a marshmallow dream bar me bitch don t play games with me typical average iiiight just like every other starbucks in the world
this location sucks because of the parking however the store inside is pretty big it looks very small from the outside

updated review only three stars today as the pastry display case was pitiful to say the least the barista explained to me that they are having great difficulty getting their pastry orders especially the pumpkin scone order the starbucks advertising for the season talks up pumpkin pumpkin pumpkin and yet they have nothing in their stores someone has obviously dropped the ball major big time on this one nice sb s clean with friendly baristas ample parking out front only drawback is it has no drive thru conveniently located in shopping center with a grocery store

it s a starbucks in a really neat building i love how starbucks has re claimed this space and made it usable again the major downsides are that it s very busy and the drive through is incredibly slow major upside is that this building is a two fer and you can get chipotle next door
a very crowded starbucks the staff was extremely nice but unfortunately did not have my go to chai tea

stopped here while shopping at canal place while in town it s a very small location tucked away in the corner on the ground floor the line builds up rather quickly and on the day i went service was slower than molasses there was one person taking orders and one barista on duty i understand that locations can get slammed with orders but it was almost as if it was the barista s first day he just moved very slowly i couldn t order a java chip frappachino because they were out of java chips so they may want to evaluate their ordering of supplies i m interested how service is when business is slow hopefully not the same and if so i would give him a break

located on a corner so it is easy in and out on a busy street i opted for the drive thru as i drive a huge truck and the parking lot spaces are on the smaller side the drive thru was a squeeze too but i made it without any mishaps ordered my cold brew and they had it ready by the time i made it to the window staff was decent and prices were normal for the bucks
very long line service was friendly though had to partake in a mocha frappuccino they re really good stuff

what can i say it s starbucks they do have some of the more friendly starbucks employees i ve encountered at this location i think because of its proximity to and carmel there is always a line at the drive thru you will get much faster service and be much less irritated just parking and going inside for your coffee trust me you don t want to be stuck behind the carmel soccer mom ordering her venti pump caramel pump white mocha scoops vanilla bean powder extra ice frappuchino with shots poured over the top apagotto style with caramel drizzle under and on top of the whipped cream double cupped

this place was packed in the early morning everyone getting their coffee and danish fix i actually came by twice once in the morning once in the afternoon before our drive back home definitley a slower starbucks compared to others but they make my skinny vanilla latte perfectly only con is you can t reload your starbucks card app or use a free bday drink at this location

i visit and spend a lot starbucks stores and hold them to a higher standard than a other coffee places as they charge a premium price for coffee and food it s hit and miss like others have said and this is just a slower store which is why it is always claustrophobic in there many of the baristas are very nice but this location is not very intuitive and the older manager lady here is sour sorry i m not the only one who has commented on this it would be helpful to put the mobile orders where customers can get to them i
parking and driver thru here sucks especially on a rainy day if you re looking for a place to plug in and web surf probably not the place

quick access good drinks a few indoor seats and consistently good drinks i like this location for it s convenience because in the mornings it s a little slower than the location down the street while it doesn t have a large indoor area to sit down it does have a few seats where there are a couple of regulars that offer a kind a greeting if you feel like chatting it is never a challenge to find someone to talk with usually i need to get some grad school work done or catch up on yelp reviews and i hide out behind my computer the seating outside the store is plentiful the baristas are always helpful and it seems that they could use a couple of extra hands but they are good at what they do and always kind

i ve frequented this spot in the last few months because i ve been working at a near by office the thing i like about this store is that it has a drive through that typically moves at a decent pace the bummer is that i order the same thing every day and it is never made the same in addition i get charged differently for the exact same order if i don t mobile order it pretty much a decent spot that does have some outdoor seating

legit north county spot it s in a crappy lot by a strip mall but has a lot of parking really close to the hwy too the inside is very very small the drinks are of normal starbucks quality the location over by dunn and is larger and nicer

i m a starbucks fan i just am this one of all of them near the franklin area is the worst they always have not enough people working and the service is so slow unfortunately this one is most convenient and the drive thru who doesn t love the drive thru only a couple times that i ve been here have the staff been friendly or helpful usually i have to check for a pulse of all the locations nearby this one the iced coffee espresso shots taste the most burnt which is annoying it s also loud i came once to get some work done and the speakers were so loud i had to leave maybe that s the goal plus the internet is real choppy here not my fave

whether it s am or pm customer service should be top notch i called in advance for travelers and was told it might be ready when you need it if we don t get a lot of customers this morning i did pay for the travelers when i arrived so i would expect to be treated as a customer as well

now that ikes is gone there are not many places to hang out over coffee nearby but i had to meet someone here once and i m glad i did there s a huge table that can be used for groups i was ready for a discussion on race but i was the only minority in here for the hour i stayed

coffee is coffee to me so maybe not fair to judge but this location of starbucks just had too many people that seemed to be using this as their early morning place for hygiene a small line at the bathroom and the place was a little unkempt compared to the sb i went to about a mile away the previous morning this is a good location very convenient and did not have time for the extra distance
a starbucks in the brewery district what a surprise pretty good location a spacious bright area with lots of laptop friendly tables

mostly average starbucks they are still a little slow which could be due to being a new location other than that it is your average expensive high calorie coffee joint so far it s kept pretty clean and the service is friendly basically it s an ice cream shop loaded with caffeine that no one looks down on me for having in the mornings thankfully it s located right next to a dentist so after i have my java chip and a bunch of pastries i can go next door and have all of my cavities filled

i stayed at the hotel across from this starbucks and walked to this starbucks i am from the west coast and was looking forward to going to starbucks and talking to the barista about things to do around town well that didn t happen one this is a very busy starbucks even at am two not one employee smiled or looks at you and three when you finally get to the register you don t get a greeting just a what can i get for you now let me say no one is rude but for a southern town i was very disappointed how unfriendly this starbucks was i will stick to the hotel coffee for the rest of my trip
st louis mo airport good coffee as usual workers need to drink coffee to wake the heck up customer service sucks my warmed bread is cold bad attitude from the servers

they were nice and gave my sweet little lb baby a puppachino he looked like scaly wag when he got it all over his little pug face they were very polite however dogs are not allowed we had to eat it in the parking lot while walking my sweet little pug friend i couldn t help but notice the amount of cancer sticks thrown behind starbucks landscaping shame on you starbucks employees keep southport beautiful

not the worst but they definitely need to work on some things this starbucks is already located in a target store so i feel like it should lose points for that i don t like having to wade through a sea of middle aged oblivious moms in yoga pants who would rather chit chat than let you get your coffee this actually happened i m not stereotyping there was one woman working when i was here and she was being run ragged she was hustling getting coffee food and everything else that the mams were demanding of her i seriously think she was thrilled when i just ordered a large iced coffee at other stores such a simple order comes out right away but because there was only one person working it took a while seriously target get that girl some help the coffee was mediocre as expected and i only stopped here in the first place because someone gave me a gift card for christmas because they obviously hate me or something anyway if you need coffee during your target trip then this is the spot otherwise you should probably avoid

the employees at this starbucks know their customers really well the drinks are good and the service was friendly this is starbucks really small and narrow so don t plan on going there if you want work done because noise echoes a lot
the staff looked like no one wanted to be there and the seating is not relaxing or very inviting they can make a decent drink no problem but the atmosphere is not what it could be

super disappointed that i just had to sit here and wait minutes for my one drink there was a lot of people in the drive thru and apparently they got priority there was only one person ahead of me inside the store and they didn t even apologize or offer me anything for having to wait for so long for one drink

this drive thru is literally my nightmare can t help the horrific parking situation due to location however it is by far the slowest drive thru i ve ever been to i live around the corner so i go this starbucks on my way to work and i have to plan to leave extra early just in case the drive thru takes an extra minutes which happens almost every time i just don t understand it three stars because my order is always correct and the staff is pleasant

i tried the new guava passion fruit drink i love guava and it was really good except that there was very little drink the cup was filled to the top with ice so that it was gone in just a few sips i now know to order with light or no ice it was a rip off the way i got it

due to their south street location this starbucks is usually more crowded than dead it s not the biggest starbucks ever but there s space upstairs and the staff are fine the place is clean enough including the bathrooms at least when i was there it ll do if you have a hankering for starbucks otherwise i recommend hitting up a local coffee shop instead

is it too much to ask that the cashier have some sort of personality and acknowledge the customer in front of her no acknowledgement no hello no attempted add ons and no thank you everyone else working was very nice but first impression is everything and this one sucked
service isn t as efficient at the marsh road location but it works

i disagree with kara this is not the worst starbucks in the area and actually has one of the nicest coffee lounge spaces in town tall lofted ceilings look out to mt rose and the surrounding summit sierra mall it s actually a very scenic location the coffee is like every other starbucks good but not great

this starbucks is in a hopping spot right in the middle of the philadelphia premium outlets so be prepared to wait in line for a while they do a pretty good job of keeping things moving but it is crowded they do have some outside seating which is nice all in all its your average starbucks

definitely not my favorite starbucks to visit although my order was made quickly the customer service was nit great and to be honest i would rather wait longer for my order and have a friendly barista than what happened today very upsetting considering this starbucks is the closest one to where i live

if you re looking for a place to chill and sip on a frappe this is not the place this starbucks is cramped with very little seating like i counted tiny tables i came in one week and there was this long single line going out the door it looked like everyone was getting off a school bus that s how tight it is inside youre better off going to the starbucks inside safeway maybe the service here is alright it wasn t messy when i came but i wouldn t call this starbucks ghetto

i am at this starbucks all the time i work just north of downtown between downtown and germantown this starbucks is the nearest coffee shop i can walk to or a coffee shop inside the farmer s market but i prefer not to do that it s in a hidden little area within the doubletree hotel walk down the diagonal sidewalk thing and you ll find it the lines can get very long a lot of state employees frequent this location in large groups but they re pretty fast most of the time they also do a happy hour between and i think when it s buy one get one free on drinks it s just a starbucks but it s gotten me through many an exhausting day
the service is ok coffee and teas are standard if service was better it would get a higher rating they couldn t keep up with people working and people in line

i have a couple complaints about this starbucks my boyfriend and i live nearby so this is the starbucks we frequent especially when we need a pick me up on our way to phoenix we usually get a coffee and a breakfast sandwich my favorite is the spinach feta wrap which is always perfection but twice now my boyfriend has gotten the sausage egg sandwich and it s been cold in the middle another time we frequented this place was to get an iced tea and a latte i ordered an unsweetened passion fruit and the bf got a vanilla latte his came out at least minutes before mine and when i finally got mine and took a sip i could tell it had sweetener in it i checked the cup label to see if it said unsweetened and it did i stood there for another couple minutes before an employee approached me and made me a new drink this all wouldn t have bothered me so much if i didn t have to wait so long in between erik s drink and mine

parking is limited here and they are always short staffed i have been here numerous times were i have been waiting in line forever and ended up leaving with out ordering anything today i went to this location to give it another try and i have to say it was quick getting in and out i ordered a trenta passion tea lemonade and it was perfect apparently they are building a bigger starbucks next to the bank of america in the parking lot so we shall see if the service changes but overall today was a good day to make a purchase at starbucks

what can i say it s a starbucks after all not my first choice for coffee but pleasant to do some work in a comfy oversized chair with soft music in the background i was there for hours and it was crazy busy the entire time coffee was starbucks

great place to take a break not too fond of the outdoor seating since it s right on the corner of the parking lot where cars come and go i stop here on my weekly shopping trips because it s convenient for me still can t get use to the coed bathrooms the servers are sweet and friendly here
can t complain with starbucks just watch leave extra early if u want to go to this location in the mornings during the week because it gets crowded

it s hit or miss on everything at times your drink is perfect sometimes it is half full or they didn t mix it right or something hit or miss sometimes they run out of straws or run out of cups or run out of sugar hit or miss

coffee and service were as expected the location itself is challenging to get in and out of being that it shares a building with a famous fast food restaurant the bathrooms were a bit confusing you have to get a key code from a barista and honestly were rather messy though for the bottom line the coffee was crafted exactly as i d expect and service was friendly so i can not be too harsh i would just reccomend some kind of sign with directions for the bathroom doors and to keep up on them a little better

sunday at noon and they were not organized or efficient the drive thru was packed so i thought going inside would be faster nope i think they take care of drive thru customers before in store customers after waiting a good bit for my grand mocha i had to ask for and wait longer for a warmed morning bun huh food and coffee are consistently good but their service needs help with efficiency

average starbucks i have been through the drive thru and inside many times parking lot is always full and sometimes i have to park in the neighboring hotels lot the employees are friendly however there are always new people here accuracy of the orders are sacrificed because they are always training new people i am pretty leinient on my scoring because of that i am not reviewing starbucks products on this review because i have done so in others their products taste the same as every other one around
regular starbucks coffee at the airport entrance of terminal b they actually have quite a few choices and get really busy
rating starbucks is like rating mcdonald s what s the point yep it s a starbucks on market street attached to the huge marriott hotel about what you d expect from a starbucks no better no worse

first visit while in this area slow filling mobile orders over minutes otherwise same expected high quality with pleasant barista ship i d say this location is difficult to access from pendleton pike with crowded parking lot i d bet drive their is its primary business and that may work better
its a nice starbucks location plenty of inside seating in this small strip mall order is always correct parking is tough so we park in the next strip mall and walk over

drink quality is uniform to any other starbucks i ve been to the people working however had zero communication be it with me or the other workers i think the only words exchanged were my order and my total they also were slow and disorganized there was some asian kid behind the counter with a coat and backpack on making drinks he was talking to some friends on the other side of the counter but where everyone else was wearing the black shirt apron and hat it looked like he works there he did know what he was doing and he stopped by on an off day with his friends to make drinks for them and a few customers really weird parking lot looks cramped but to be perfectly honest it isn t nearly as ridiculous as the starbucks in southington ct so i can t even hold that against them in comparison when i m at our friends in the area i ll stop by if i need my starbucks fix but if i was a local i d probably try to find another

baristas work hard as this location is always slammed with customers i used to be able to put a mobile order in and count on it being ready when i got there i don t know what happened in the last few weeks but every time i have put a mobile order in i ve had to wait up to minutes in the lobby for my order so i m taking a break from starbucks for awhile it s really disappointing
i m still upset about the stupid trash can issue of my previous post but otherwise it s a decent starbucks locations

i m sure most would consider me somewhat of a coffee snob i blame it on being from the seattle area which is obviously also starbucks home but i am in no way too good for starbucks especially because when it comes for convenience and ease of acquiring said coffee on my way to work nothing is easier than this place usually hoppin with all the people going to work in intech commons etc at least in the morning but the staff are nice and pleasant and they do the best they can in a rush thank you for helping me out when my bod desperately needs to be caffeinated sometimes in the morning also my workplace thanks you for saving my productivity on those days ps if you ever get the bug up your backside to make it a drive thru do it people will love it and it may ease the congestion inside the store in the am

i like local but it s the only option out here other than pj s pj s is local ish but their coffee isn t to my liking so here i am it s easy to sit here and grab a few moments of zen before my evening class

not my favourite starbucks it s much too busy for me it isn t well lit and the size of it is kind of oddly shaped very long which makes everything squishy staff are nice and i would say that i go here primarily because of the convenience factor why not have a latte to sip as you stroll around southgate at least they make your drinks properly here
coffee and staff are nice but the lines here are abominable plan a minimum mins during the week in the morning
good danish fresh buttery and soft but for a medium iced chai tea latte really and it wasn t even that good ummm half bucks wasted here

a little nasty and testy when you ask for refill the workers automatically take for granted that you walked off the premises when you ve been sitting here for minutes working on your computer this is not good business practices by the employees of starbucks

the nashville airport has two starbucks locations the other one can be a disaster line of people i m almost always flying southwest the other terminal but sometimes i ll come to this starbucks because i think it often has shorter lines that s all it s a starbucks and maybe the lines are shorter than that other one
service is okay can get very busy at time typical starbucks coffee it s okay it s overpriced hard to find a seat because so many people come in there and sit on the computer for hours

starbucks is my go to place to work and kill some time for really one reason free refills on tea and coffee for members this location is the only starbucks in the area but it is definitely not my favorite in tampa they are always crowded never feel like they have enough seats or tables the outdoor area feels like it is sitting in the parking lot and about half the time in the afternoons they seem to be out of something sometimes more than one they are super nice here and the problems aren t enough that i don t come when i m in the area but if i m heading elsewhere i would far rather be at the kennedy starbucks this one meets my caffeine needs but it isn t the most relaxing of locations

this is a typical starbucks there aren t any cushy chairs which is kind of sad and it s very crowded because it s right near a lot of classroom buildings for penn and drexel however the baristas are always very friendly and they try their best to move people through the lines i would recommend going here during off peak hours such as early in the morning or in the evening where you can usually get a seat

usually starbucks are just known as starbucks however we re unique in st louis and this location is often called the starbucks that used to be a bank it s pretty much your standard starbucks with a bit more seating than normal they have a few patio tables and a a decent amount of indoor seating you ll see an abnormal amount of students studying here i don t think there are many colleges nearby so i suppose they re high schoolers anyways i don t really go to starbucks very often but this one ain t so bad except if you re into drive throughs cause there ain t none
friendly workers of course expensive i can t understand why they don t put up a fence by the drive through the view is all of their garbage very unsightly

this place always seems packed probably because it s the only one near university street on campus i ordered my drink ahead on the app and it was not ready at the predicted time all the seats were full so i had to take my drink to go

i like this starbucks location it s very relaxing and they have a good amount of sitting space both inside and outside my drinks are usually mixed very well here also sometimes they re under staffed and get long lines today i had to ask for a refund because i was waiting over minutes and the manager wasn t very friendly about it however overall i enjoy my experiences here and everyone is very friendly they also give great recommendations for new coffee drinkers
stars for coffee sometimes it s very weak and flaw stars for customer service polite friendly baristas
really nice people just wish they could get my order right i am a daily to double daily and my order is only right maybe half the time and it is the same order every time

clean but mobile app ordered although confirmed did not go through at least on their end so caution when using mobile order they were good about it and it was nice there otherwise your typical starbucks
it is hard to screw up sbux as i call it it s close by and the drive thru is open late which i am happy about so far so good let s hope it stays that way

nice starbucks inside harrah s casino only problem you ve got to walk through a cigarette smoke filled casino to get to it harrah s is an old school dirty smelly old casino to my surprise the starbucks was clean and relatively fresh

out of towner review thank you and you suck are how i feel given that you are in a convention center you d think although it was the weekend you d have better hours of operation conventions run days a week my convention happened to run sunday tuesday so opening day sunday everyone was jonsing for coffee all day but after pm you were screwed it was closed you could endure the gross humidity and or pouring rain and walk a few blocks to the marriott starbucks but theirs closes early too annoyed to say the least but for the two remaining days was their saving grace although the line was continuously people deep these automons kept it movin no lie they were quick and efficient for a very small set up they weren t the friendliest but they were damn good and efficient with their time you can t complain about that if i walk the length of this convention center you better reward me with a caffeinated beverage your wimpy hours just won t cut it for all the various people who saunter through here step up your game but keep up the good work it s a catch sorry guys keepin convention er s caffeinated on their timetable

this starbucks is usually top notch i m not sure if it was just a bad day or if they don t have the hang of drivethru service yet we had to give our order three times to three separate people and the order was still wrong my chai was so sweet i couldn t drink it it was only filled up part of the way and it lacked the three shots of espresso that i asked for three times if i go back here anytime soon i am not using the drivethru because it was chaos
